text:
Installed 4.0-RC from CD-image found on the net.  Installed the
emacs-20.5 package as well as the XFree86 distributions.  Trying to
invoke emacs wins me: 

ion% emacs
/usr/libexec/ld-elf.so.1: Shared object "libXThrStub.so.6" not found

Fix: 

Unknown at this time.
How-To-Repeat: 
see Description.
